ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "budget_year" TEXT /* Year the budget is for (e.g., FY16-17) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the budget belongs to */,
  "fund_code" INTEGER /* Fund code for the budget */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the budget */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the budget */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the budget (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_fund_code FOREIGN KEY ("fund_code") REFERENCES funds ("fund_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue */,
  "account_category" TEXT /* Category of the revenue (e.g., Utility Consumption Tax) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the revenue (e.g., Revenue) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the revenue */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the revenue belongs to */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue (e.g., Federal, State, Local) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the revenue was collected */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who collected the revenue */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenues_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "account_category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure (e.g., Salaries and Wages) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the expenditure (e.g., Expense) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the expenditure belongs to */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of expenditure (e.g., Capital, Operational) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was paid */,
  "paid_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who authorized the payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Public Works) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund (e.g., General Fund) */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., General, Special Revenue) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "from_budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the transfer is from */,
  "to_budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the transfer is to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transfer */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the transfer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_transfers_from_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_transfers_to_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance */,
  "fund_code" INTEGER /* Fund code of the balance */,
  "balance_date" TEXT /* Date of the balance */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the balance */,
  "balance_type" TEXT /* Type of balance (e.g., Beginning, Ending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_balances_fund_code FOREIGN KEY ("fund_code") REFERENCES funds ("fund_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_versions_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., budget, revenue, expenditure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., budget summary, revenue report) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)
